title: Technology
tagline: Cloud, software, devices, and the platforms that run them.
description: The biggest, most valuable companies in the world live here — software-as-a-service, consumer hardware, cloud infrastructure, and the cybersecurity layer that defends all of it. Tech is where multi-decade compounders meet the hottest growth stories.

title: AI & Semiconductors
tagline: The pick-and-shovel layer of the AI buildout.
description: From GPUs and accelerators to memory, foundries, and the AI software stack on top — these are the companies whose chips, models, and platforms power the entire generative-AI economy.

title: Financials
tagline: Banks, insurers, and asset managers — the plumbing of the economy.
description: Money-center banks, regional lenders, the Big Six in Canada, life and P&C insurers, exchanges, and asset managers. A barometer for credit, rates, and the broader economy.

title: Healthcare
tagline: Pharma, biotech, devices, and the GLP-1 supercycle.
description: From mega-cap pharma minting cash on obesity drugs to early-stage biotech swinging for breakthrough therapies, plus medical devices and managed care. Defensive, but with real growth pockets.

title: Energy
tagline: Oil, gas, pipelines, and the cash machines of the TSX.
description: Upstream producers, integrated majors, midstream pipelines, and oilfield services. Canada is overweight here for a reason — long-life reserves and a parade of dividend payers.

title: Consumer
tagline: Brands, retailers, and the businesses that ride the wallet.
description: Discretionary and staples — from Costco's membership flywheel to luxury, autos, restaurants, and grocery. A read on the strength of the consumer wallet.
